faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Bayonne, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Bayonne typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Bayonne homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Bayonne are completed in one day, with heat treatments typically taking 6-8 hours and chemical treatments requiring 2-4 hours of active service. Follow-up visits are scheduled 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Bayonne home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise the temperature to lethal levels. Chemical treatments require you to stay out for 4-6 hours after application. We provide detailed preparation instructions before your scheduled service.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Bayonne?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We follow strict safety protocols and provide clear re-entry instructions to ensure your home is completely safe after treatment.
